reviews.review_description: I bought my headset about a year ago and used it a few times until I found this game.. and let me tell you I was hooked. I’d play until my eyes were burning and my shoulder felt like it was going to fly off. The ability to use room scale, and actually get some decent movement in game is great. Overall I give the game a 9/10 it’s the only reason I’ve used my headset in months

I bowl way better that I would in real life 😄 it's a fun and a very interactive game to play. I like the different options for alleys with different atmospheres, I haven't played tournaments yet but probably will. I just like the fact if you feel like bowling at any given moment in time just flick the headset on and play, the loading time is quick. I like live play because it really sounds and feels like your in an alley..

Thanks

i read downloaded the metapass just to play this cause i was genuinely curious about vr bowling. it's unreasonably immersive and the scaling for the game is fairly accurate. i mess around and play for hours at a time because it is genuinely a fun game.

Hello; It happens that when you make yourself available for challenges in order to play online, people behave with no education at all: after 2 or 3 throws, they left the match with no words or reason, or even before! Also, as of today the other people's avatar show as a blue figure, totally weird to see. The result is a game you cannot play online, thanks to the stupid people out there. It does not happen that often in other games, like Eleven TT. But here?... It's unbearable. And sad.

developer_response.body:
Hi. Sorry to hear about your experience. I'd recommend trying tournaments, as players usually take those matches more seriously, or playing with your friends.

Regarding the blue figure, it is a placeholder Meta Avatar that appears if the avatar fails to load from Meta's service, most likely due to a temporary issue.

reviews.review_description: This only happens in the premium bowling app. When the other player that I'm playing with talks it just sounds like they're gurgling and talking underwater. I cannot understand anything that they're saying. This came on suddenly. And it makes it difficult to enjoy the game anymore because part of playing with my friends is being able to talk with them.

developer_response.body: Hi. Sorry about the issue. We made voice chat updates in the latest 1.32 version. Let us know if it still occurs.

reviews.review_description: I love this game. I play it almost daily.
i love bowling and this is bye far the best bowling game
I love this game. I got a quest a month ago and I bowl the most by far. I love the league and tournament modes too.

This game would be great if they would fix it. Global rankings are a joke. Its suppose to be realistic, but a player with 54 900 series? Almost 3000 300 games? Give me a break. There have only been 42 sanctioned 900 series ever bowled in real life. So either you have a player base that has found a cheat or exploit. Or you have game that needs to be updated. 

The game has lots of potential if only the developer would look at why so many players are bowling ungodly amounts of perfect or near perfect series. The odds of bowling a perfect series are 1 in 92 million. So there is no way a player can bowl 54 of them. More than one would be a miracle in itself. 

Tournaments were fun. Global ranking as I said is a joke. Because these people are bowling 300 games each week. And 900 series every other. Make this game more realistic. Allow players only 1 shot at the weekly for global rankings at least. No restarts, just make them show their skill as it should be. 

As a real life bowler for almost 40 years. Having managed a bowling alley, ran leagues and bowled 5 nights a week. I know this game potential, but there needs to be fixes put in place to bring it back to earth.  

Also consider doing a challenge mode as well. Split pick ups, trick shots etc.. another feature would be 9 pin no tap.  Just some food for thought. This game is fun until you get to the competitive side and then it loses all of its luster as some people have clearly found exploits in the mechanics.

It's pretty good, but I also wanted the social side of things, my friends can join but when I share the YouTube music they can't see it despite selecting share with friends. If the system was more reliable this would easily be a 4 or 5 star game.

Given that the audio works now, thanks to developer response. I would say this is at least a 4 star. My friends and I really enjoyed it yesterday.

developer_response.body: Hi. Thanks for your feedback! Sharing music does not automatically start playback on your friends’ games. They need to point at your avatar and click the music icon to follow your music, or open the music web player and select Source -> You.

reviews.review_description: Very nicely created and kept
I am happy with my 900 series and 16 perfect games!))
Best Bowling Simulation to me

I held off buying this forever because I had forevr bowling and didn't think I needed another bowling game but honestly I picked the wrong game originally because this runs so much better and I feel the physics are closer to real life. Not trying to trash other Devs but this is the bowling game you want.
Usurper fun

they got me on buying a lane, any one I try to invite has to pay....should be if I buy it I can bring any one in to play, that was the point of me doing this, needless to say I just don't play that much any more....

developer_response.body: Hi. Thanks for your feedback. Please choose alleys that are included with the base game when playing with friends. Unfortunately, add-on content needs to be owned by all players to play together.

reviews.review_description: I love this game. I can put the music on and play solo and be in my one world.
Why won't it let me update my premium bowling

developer_response.body: Hi, you'll see an option to update in the app library when an update is available. At the time of writing this, you already have the latest version installed.

reviews.review_description:
This is by far one of the best bowling games I’ve played. The gameplay feels polished, responsive, and highly immersive.
My main criticism is the lack of personal space around the bowler. Implementing a buffer zone to prevent other players from crowding or interfering during a throw would greatly improve the competitive experience.
Aside from that, there are a few minor refinements that could be made, but overall the game is very well executed and close to perfect. Also, they should remake the voice communication to allow it to be even more user friendly. Hardly anybody ever talks.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! There is an Anti-Interference option in the Settings menu. If you set it to High, players around you will be hidden more aggressively.

reviews.review_description: Fun and available to play offline.
Really good bowling game, the hand physics are pretty spot on and can adjust them to properly work with ur style, would like more bowling balls but solid game

I'm a bowler and this game is as close as you can get to real bowling. Sure there are some hiccups, could be user error. But this game is great. Could use a career mode. But its fun as hell

Edit: I agree the in game characters are creepy and disconnected. Could there be a possible tournament platform? That would be cool. Maybe get some licensed bowling balls would be cool too.

Update: while the addition of hands is a cool thing, it has totally changed the way the bowling ball rolls now. Before I had no issue curving the ball, but now I'm struggling to find the right hand position to get my curve back. Help!!

Update 2: what meant by having trouble curving it is this. I'm right handed and want to hook it right to left on the lane, but because of the way the ball is positioned on the hand in game now, it's changes the throwing dynamic. The holes use to be on the back side of the ball facing the player. Now they are on the side where the hand is. But to authentic the experience the hand should be underneath the ball like you would hold it in real life. This game is an A+ entry. The pin action is spot on, I love this game though. Could you look into this issue.

Update 3: I'm still having issues with trying my usual right to left curve from the right hand position. Please move the finger holes back where they use to be. I front of the bowler. I am struggling to like this game at the moment now that the throwing mechanics have changed. Please fix

Update 4: this game now sucks. They have made way too many mechanic changes and the game is crap. I use to average 265+ and now I can't break 200. They devs have ruined this game i completely regret buying this game and want a refund!!!

Update 5: I now refuse to play this broken, crap a** game and still haven't got a refund. Ugh!!

developer_response.body: Hi. Sorry about the issue. If you want interactive help for throwing, please click the ? icon in the game and select “Throwing With a Curve.” In VR Options, there is an Allow Reverse Spin setting — please make sure it’s set to Off. Setting Ball Hand Offset to 0 positions the ball in relation to the controller the same way it was in the original launch version. You can request a refund from the Meta Horizon mobile app.

reviews.review_description: As someone who has bowled leagues in real life for 90 percent of my life thus quickly became my favorite meta game but after the latest update the game just flat out doesnt work when i get near the lane the game freezes and my dude starts teleporting backwards

developer_response.body: Hi. You may have accidentally used snap turning. We added a snap-turning feature in the 1.31 update. You can turn in 45-degree increments using the secondary controller by default (the left controller if you are using the right controller for throwing). You can change the controller in VR Options → Snap Turning Controller. If you turn it off, the game will work the same way as before. Please contact support@sadetta.com if the issue continues.

reviews.review_description: I have been playing this for years but I rarely leave reviews but this game deserves one, top marks, very enjoyable. One tiny request which might be a nice touch (if it doesn't already exist) a chance to share replays with a friend? I got an evila split and god knows how I made it but I did and could not show anyone my slick move.

While it’s mostly realistic there’s some pinfall that makes no sense whatsoever. I’m an actual bowling IRL who is a pretty decent bowler and I face people in tournaments on this game who stand in the middle no hook and throw it at the head pin and carries the 10 pin every time. The ball should deflect off to the right gutter after contact. Lose in tournaments that i’m not missing the pocket on to garbage carry because i’m leaving 10 or 7 pins. Fix your game. Not to mention the random unrealistic oil patterns where they’re just a glob of oil and you have no choice but to throw it at the pocket while standing left & or right. Create realistic patterns maybe even from the pro tour in real life. Not (spade) where you have to throw no hook directly at the pocket or loft it 10 feet down the lane to reach the oil.

Is a great fun game, I like the custom ball thing as well but there's only one thing missing and that's a single player career mode or story mode, I think you could have a lot of fun going from town to town, alley to alley winning trophies and tournaments against npcs, maybe you could get a rival along the way, a bit of a story mode where you go from rookie circuit to playing in the webber cup or worlds in vegas or something along them lines and maybe add characters from the movie kingpin and unlocking new bowling balls ect, maybe this could be a thing you guys could put in the game. Just an idea
The best v r bowling game I've ever played

I just about put my quest 3 through the wall out of frustration trying to get my daughter and I lined up to play a game together. Absolutely unbelievably frustrating. Has to be one of the worst UIs in any game ever in the history of games when it comes to getting started. Absolute disaster. The game plays great and is a lot of fun. I imagine it would be a lot more fun if I could play with someone else in the same room with two headsets. Glad I didn't pay for this.

developer_response.body: Hi. The easiest way to play with your friends is to click Friend Game from the main menu, then select Multiple Headsets, choose your friend from the friends list, and click Challenge.

reviews.review_description: I want to start this by saying I and a 2 handed bowler IRL and average about 190. The development team needs to work on hooking vrs not hooking. There is almost no advantage to hooking your ball. The straight ball strikes just as much if not more compared to hooking. Hooking is harder and should strike more than the straight ball  strikes. The straight ball never leaves a five pin or splits so the straight ball is ultimately better and easier then hooking the ball.

reviews.review_title: My favorite game to play with friends
reviews.review_description: Im not big into playing social multiplayer games with people I dont know, but I do have a few friends I play with in VR, and this and Walkaboout are the two staples we never get bored of. And between those two, Id say Premium Bowling is my favorite. I just like the act of bowling, and the physics of it are great. It reminds me the Wii Bowling from the Wii Sports pack, but I probably like this even better. Great game.
my favorite game so far! cheers from Mexico

reviews.review_title: missing lane markers and licensed alleys
reviews.review_description: why do the bowling lanes not have break point markers? please add the lanemarkers. and please make licensed alleys. having licensed alleys would be cool like bowlero

developer_response.body: Hi. Thanks for your review and suggestions! Alleys have different types of lane markers, and some of them include break point markers, for example Tournament Alley and Vintage 50s.

reviews.review_description: How do I join.

developer_response.body: Hi, and welcome to tournaments! You can join a tournament starting 30 minutes before it begins, and registration stays open until the qualifying phase is about to end, roughly 10 minutes after the start. To join, go to Tournaments, select the highlighted next or ongoing tournament, and click Join.

reviews.review_title: Don’t listen to the 1 star reviews
reviews.review_description: Don’t listen to the 1 star reviews, the game is amazingly fun, and there are some really cool people, though it could use some work, first, sometimes when people talk their mic cuts out, not a huge problem but sometimes I can’t really understand what they are saying, next, there’s also some bad people, I met this one guy who was putting me down for my first few throws, he was pretty toxic, and was also pretty cocky about everything, he was just overall a rude guy, so yeah the game is really fun and pretty polished too, but it can use work, W owner.

I'm totally obsessed. It's so fun and satisfying to watch the ball curve. The controls are perfect and easy to pick up, and quickly you'll find there's a huge window for skill to come into play here, making it addictive for anyone, like me, that lives for target striking solo sports. It's well done too as a multilayer game, which generally I stay away from. Also, it's so customizable and in depth that you'll be selecting balls based on hook, length, and weight... practicing on SEVERAL different oil patterns... and chasing that 300 until your bicep is sore! Well done, whoever made this!

developer_response.body: Thank you, and Happy New Year!

reviews.review_description:
I absolutely love this game! I play it most days and say I’m just gonna do a game or two and end up 10 games in pretty easily. Lol

People are anti social on group games and tournaments, but it’s fun otherwise
This game can be played laying down which is great. I throw overhand 😆 It's fun with the family.

I was bowling having fun, dancing around, seen a guy 3 lanes over bowling solo, so i went over and danced by him. He instantly did the finger clicks lookin like he was reporting me. I went back to my lane. And the next day i got a 6 day BAN for DANCING 🕺 for 2 seconds beside the sweaty nerd. He was rank 9 so of course hes gonna report for petty stuff. Now i cant even play with anyone

developer_response.body: Hi. Please don’t stand in front of other players while they’re bowling, as it can be distracting. The temporary online penalty only applies to public online play, so you can still enjoy the game with friends or in single-player mode.

reviews.review_description: I love this bowling game.  I don't have a bowling alley where I live, so this is a great substitute! I can bowl by myself or go to the online option and bowl with people from all over the world.  So much fun from the comfort of home!! I can afford that.
Been playing this everyday for a few weeks now. My body is  soar but have to push through, it's just too good. Online tournaments, leagues, and head to head games. Having a blast!
Multiplayer is Very Very broken and not supported. Also grip detection won't release your ball often.

developer_response.body:
Hi. Multiplayer is supported. For public matches, select Online Multiplayer from the main menu. To play with friends, choose Friend Game → Multiple Headsets, then select your friend and click Challenge.

When throwing, please try to make a proper bowling backswing, similar to real bowling. You can view interactive help by clicking the ? icon in the game.

If you need assistance, feel free to contact us at support@sadetta.com
 or join our Discord at www.premiumbowling.com/Discord

reviews.review_description:
I only played for an hour or so but the physics felt solid. The bowling felt right, the sound sounded good. 

A critique would be the walkup into the ball toss is not intuitive, but what could they do about that?

Another bigger critique, I know it is like being in a bowling alley. But I am not walking back slowly to see the monitor for I am sure are clever animations. Walking is so slow I would probably miss them anyhow. Adjust the monitor so it is visible from the bowling line.

I’m really enjoying playing this game.
It feels a bit lonely that there’s no effect when getting a spare.
I think it would be wonderful if a visual effect appeared for spares as well, just like when you get a strike.
Also, I feel that having moving visuals on the masking unit would really boost the atmosphere.
Realistic game, very good.

reviews.review_title: Best bowling out so far hands down
reviews.review_description:
Love the physics in this plays like real life, decent graphics like how you can format leagues..there is a few things I'd like to see done to make this a 5 star..
1, customize avatars
2, they way the avatars move need to look more real not all hunched over
3, the voice chat needs fixed it goes in and out alot so only way is to party chat invite..please fix
4, and last is we need to be able to make our own rooms and invite private ones from trolleys online
 Devs you did a great job on physics in this and detail but still got some things to do to make this 5 star it is still the best bowling out so far I will say..just keep up on the updates and fix that voice chat issue and maybe add those things I said and few more lanes if ya want🙂....keep up the good work .its worth the buy.....

UPDATE  June 14th 2021... after last update voice chat for online now works and textures seem more sharper now to well done.. there's a couple things I still would like to see and prolly the majority of the people as well ...
1) different avatars not enough options on them maybe even use the new oculus avatars...
2) give us virtual hands not just looking at ur controller I wanna see fingers go inside the ball for better realism..
3) give us at least snap turn so we can turn around without having to physically turn...
4) maybe give option to play ur own music list

Update November 5th 2023

Game is still great but still bugs me after 2 yrs there's still no snap turn or smooth turn feature why is this? Also since quest 3 alot of apps adding a mixed reality mode can u add that as well on here ? Forevr bowl has it and that's what I like on that app but I think mixed reality mode on here would be even better since looks more realistic here...thx devs I'd do a 5 star

Update November 26 2024

Still a great game but still so shocked after being out for more than 2 yrs still hasn't added smooth turn or snap turn features this should definitely be added as in 90% games have it already so I must take a star away ... also we need full body for avatars and our new ones not old ones... other than that the game is fun and runs good hopefully more new environments added soon and ball designs need more...I'll review again soon and see if change on those features to give 5 stars

UPDATE November 14th 2025
Finally after 4 or however many yrs its been out the Devs finally listened on the snap turn at least and added a arcade map 👍 now this app gets 5 stars indeed best bowling app out there hands down ...ok devs can u add smooth turn option soon as well with a option to smooth turn slow to fast meter hopefully 🙂💪🏽 but that thank u for least giving us snap turn after all these years we thank u that will help alot of others u will see and  Devs keep making this game ever greater than is 💯🙌💪🏽🙂

developer_response.body: Thanks!

reviews.review_description: If you've ever wanted a bowling alley in your house, you can now have a bowling alley in your house. Not much else to say, except that if you enjoy bowling, you should try it.

This bowling application is highly commendable. However, a key area for enhancement involves the implementation of thumbstick functionality for player rotation. The current navigation method, which necessitates backward movement for directional changes, disrupts the natural flow of gameplay and proves particularly cumbersome during social interactions with other players. Addressing this limitation to allow for more intuitive and rapid player orientation would significantly improve the user experience.
Please FIX!

developer_response.body:
Hi, thanks for your feedback! The gameplay is designed so that snap turning isn’t normally required. For example, you can simply press the trigger or grip button to pick up your default ball without needing to turn and point at it. That said, we hear you and other players, and we’ll be adding snap turning in the next update!
Update: Snap turning is now available in the 1.31. version!

reviews.review_title: As close to real life as you can get
reviews.review_description: I've bowled for a good 50 years of my 56 year life. This game is as close to real life as you can get with good physics. I'm from New England and I've learned to bowl Candlepin Bowling. I wish there was a way they could incorporate it into the game too, even with tournaments.
I really enjoy this game it's like real bowling.  Except the ball isn't heavy.

developer_response.body: Hi, and Happy New Year! We are not aware of controller issues. Please try restarting your headset.

reviews.review_description:
This was one of the first games I played in VR, and it blew me away!

I normally just play single player, offline, so my review isn't including the online modes...

I wish the announcer had more variety in what he says (He got annoying so I turned him off..)

I like the music on the different lanes.

The graphics are really nice (once I bumped them up with QGO)

And as far as replayability, Ive played it nearly every day for months, since I'm always trying to improve my score.

The NPCs are a little zombie-like, but still cool having them there.

I wish the movement allowed for rotation so a little easier to look around, but that's a nitpick...I can just physically turn around if I want to see anything around me...like I would do in real life, lol

Get this game....this and Walkabout mini golf are probably my fave go-to daily games

Although my rating says 4 stars...its actually 4.5 stars

developer_response.body: Hi. We added Snap turning in the latest 1.31 update!

reviews.review_description: This is one of the glitchiest apps I've played on VR.   I was playing with my family (6 people) if you take your headset off for longer 10 seconds, to use the restroom for instance, it will boot you out. And then people have to sign you back into the chat.  Huge annoyance.

developer_response.body:
Hi. Sorry about the issue. The headset goes into sleep mode and connections to the online game server are closed. However, it should restore gameplay automatically if you come back within 10 minutes. Please contact support@sadetta.com
 if it occurs again. I tried to replicate this issue, but unfortunately couldn’t reproduce it.

reviews.review_description:
This game is a ton of fun and really makes you feel like you’re on an alley. 

My two requests to the developer:
• please add a tunnel vision, comfort mode for walking.
• volume control for YouTube music would save that feature. As it stands, the default volume overpowers everything including talking with friends.

Love the game! - great place to chill.
But *PLEASE* ...add the option to have any website open on the screen..
Being able to watch Twitch or Kick streams, or use other music sites would be the icing on the cake :)  ...Youtube is NOT it.

So when I was doing a tournament ￼ I have the front three and then I threw a strike and they said it was a zero then I finished the game and my score was 60 and all of my strikes were supposed to be strikes not zeros I’m pissed please fix that right now.

For some unknown reason two of my players can't release ball to go down the lane toward pins. It just keeps going back to ball rack. Also these two players can't be deleted. Does anyone know if a solution?
Best bowling game ever you can curve the ball and everything and good strikes

reviews.review_title: Very fun game and fun physics
reviews.review_description: Such a fun game, great physics. If anyones reading reviews, likes bowling, and is hesitant on giving it a try don’t worry. Its really fun and worth the money and if you have the space to walk around even better gives you a good workout in the process. Give it a try!
I just wish there were players in the lobby
Have lots of fun playing with friends. Wish looked more life like

This game is awesome! I have been playing with friends on it for about 5 months now, and I do not regret any of the $20 I spent! I hope that this game continues to be this good! This has absolutely been the best game for me as a bowler who doesn't have all of the time to go and bowl everyday where I can hop on with my friends and then play with them too! I have found the tournaments absolutely amazing to play, the only complaint is that they can sometimes be laggy, but it isn't ever that bad.
It honestly feels like real bowling
This game is awesome play it all the time i would recommend.
Don’t listen to all the negative Nancy’s in here because this game is extremely fun. There’s even a music player where you can play your favorite songs and skip while you play. It’s just fantastic

reviews.review_title: As close to real as you can get
reviews.review_description:
As an IRL bowler who's had 3 right arm surgeries and can no longer bowl due to wrist pain, I found this immediately when buying my headset. Since I had Quest+, it was free for the month and I got it, played it and I love it. If you have enough room, you can do you're typical approach, or you can stand still, like I do, and do a single step with a practice armswing to set your timing. Are there things that can be improved? Of course there are. Nothing is ever perfect.

But this got me emotional because I can FEEL like I'm bowling again with the pain. I thought I'd never be able to feel that rush again, and for that, 5 stars. 

It has oil patterns, pattern wear, different balls. If you have a PC you can create custom balls to add real life balls in. There are weekly leagues and daily tournaments and 10+ alleys to bowl in. You can go into Settings and adjust your height, your throw speed to match your real life speed, and a variety of other things. There are even Avatars that will clap for you if you strike.

I hope they continue to support and improve it, but even as it is, its as close to a real life bowling simulator as I've found.
Had so much fun. Got my exercise and entertainment and never left my living room. So much fun.

I brought the game cause it said it's the best you can get on here I purchased it just for it not to work and I did everything I could think of to fix the issue but nothing just waiting for my refund cause I basically just threw money in the trash

developer_response.body: Hi. Sorry about the issue. Could you try uninstalling the game from your library, then restart the headset, and reinstall the game? Also, please ensure that the latest Quest updates are installed (Settings -> Software Update). This may help if the issue was caused by an installation issue. You may request a refund through the Meta Horizon mobile app: tap the three-lines icon -> Purchase History -> this game. You can also contact us at support@sadetta.com.

reviews.review_description: Most realistic bowling game. As a bowling pro this game is amazing. Do buy!!!!

Love, Love this game.  Great way to connect with family and friends for a fun family night, no matter where you live. Me (VA), my daughter (FL) and Grandson (ATL) love playing a few games together in our spare time.  When I’m not playing with the family I’m  in the local or multiple on line. Something for anyone who likes bowling, or if you’re looking for a way to get some moderate exercise. Try it you won’t be disappointed.

reviews.review_title: One of my go to games!
reviews.review_description:
This is one of my favourite quest games,the immersion of a bowling alley and being able to play a game with family on another headset makes it fun but competitive!
I love the bowling ball physics,the atmospheric music for each alley and I hope in the future that there may be some extra alleys to purchase to have multiple choices to pick from.
having leaderboards and tournaments make it so much fun,although I haven't tried one yet as im trying to bowl better! 
5 stars easily :)
I would recommend this game to all ages, what a fun game to play with friends and family.  5 star all day
Love playing  bowling game but younger ones keep getting ball in gutter.  Would love to be able to add barriers to stop ball going down gutters. Other wise top game.

developer_response.body: Hi! Thanks for the review. Bumpers are available in the game. Just enable the Bumpers: Off / On option when starting a new series.

reviews.review_description:
Nintendo really blew it with not taking advantage of the niche their WII Bowling created. Microsoft as usual dropped the ball as well with their Kinect. WII Bowling took the market by storm with Senior Homes and Family's playing. But where it lacked was no league play, or family multi player modes. With VR starting to mature and the release of Oculus Quest I started looking for a bowling game and came across Premium Bowling. I started reading up on it in particular in the Steam Discussion area, and the dedicated users one in particular that had quite a bit of input on the physics of the ball, pins and lane interactions. One user IN particular MegaMav, and of course the Developer who not only welcomed the help and input, actually implemented it. All this hard work is transparent in the game I just purchased to test out for my family.

In particular for my older brother whom is epileptic. He loves bowling and we have bowled in leagues since we were 5. For me it was for fun, and I even bowled in a couple of tournaments. For him, it is a passion and social time that he continues to do. Taking the bus to get to his league bowling, and with COVID shutting things down for everyone it has taken this from him. 

Well not any longer. I bought him and I our own Oculus Quests 2, so we will be bowling in a league together (but now we are 49 and 50) and multi player weekly even though we are 400 miles apart. I actually bought 3, so my daughter and grand kids can join us. 

Thanks for reconnecting the families with some old fashion bowling in a new VR world. 

I am looking forward to future updates.

Update: 9/12/2021

It has been a while and quite a few updates since the family and I tried to play premium bowling. Been playing top golf and walk about mini golf. Great games but multi player setup is easy. Well to my suprise the multi-player setup is much smother now on premium bowling. The youtube addition is nice. The scores now being displayed on the TV is a nice addition. Avatars still suck. They should just remove them and put hats on their heads. Its been a year now that they said they were working on the avatars but no update yet. The bowling itself has gotten even better. The floating balls and the multi-player syncing is better. My brother and I still joke at a barney rubble. Were used to a Brooklyn strike, turkeys, etc. Anyhow other than the avatars still sucking the rest shows improvements..

6/1/2025

New avatars with legs look good. My group played last night and started good until the boundary bug which has followed this game since the quest 2 released. So the words be talked about from the group was they were afraid to fall or hit a wall. Serious show stopper. I have reported this on their discord. They are pretty proactive so hopefully it will get the attention it needs.
Physics are spot on. Atmosphere is great. Very polished game. Solo, multiplayer options. After a year, still highly recommend.
I like how you have lots of options, but you can just get right down to playing if you really dont care and just want to throw some frames. I like game itself. Very realistic
You know nothing has really came close to Wii Sports bowling but this absolutely topped it, bringing the full immersive into your own home, I will only bowl like this.

The way the ball moves precisely how you throw it is amazing..some games come close to replicating that feeling but this one nails it.  Highly recommend to anyone rather you are an avid bowler or not.
I have had this game over a year and really enjoyed it.  However it recently locked up and I cannot open the app.  Can you help with this?? 😢

developer_response.body: Sorry about the issue. App installations are handled by the Quest system and something may have gone wrong. Please try to uninstall the game from your library, then restart the headset, and install the game again. Please also ensure you have the latest Quest updates installed from Quest Settings -> Software Update.

reviews.review_description: Very fun and customizable.  Went outside my driveway at night, turned on some music and probably looked like an idiot but had a blast. Not as hard as real bowling but also not hard on my body, I have several issues that cause me pain but this doesn't hurt me at all.  Love the different bowling alleys and atmosphere.

reviews.review_title: Goòd but what is this thing?
reviews.review_description: I LOVE THE GAME!!! But one small thing? When I bowl sometimes a random small square appears and on the square it shows the number ‘68’ has a distance line and then eyeballs at the bottom of the square? PLEASE TELL ME IVE GOT JUMPSCARED BY THIS 5 TIMES 😭

developer_response.body: Hi. It's probably an IPD adjustment notification by the Quest system,. The game doesn't show it. It's shown if you scroll the IPD wheel on your Quest 3 headset, which moves lens distance to match your eyes.  Please make sure the headset is tightened properly, so it doesn't move around too much when you're throwing.

reviews.review_description: Seriously, I absolutely love this game. Was looking for a good bowling game, coming from Switch Sports and this one is a gem. Balls with different behaviors, line tracking, good control sensitivity, beautiful bowling alleys and no online requirement. Great job!
